task: Launch-quality advanced task: Active Sonar Echo Classifier Threshold Review. Reality context: an acoustic monitoring system needs threshold tuning from controlled test echoes. Embedded packet: metric map: metric1=echo_snr_dB, metric2=doppler_Hz, metric3=false_alarm_cost, metric4=miss_cost; records: R1 echo_snr_dB=21.8 doppler_Hz=-104.5 false_alarm_cost=237367 miss_cost=499792; R2 echo_snr_dB=14.3 doppler_Hz=50.7 false_alarm_cost=93554 miss_cost=186916; R3 echo_snr_dB=24.5 doppler_Hz=42 false_alarm_cost=178827 miss_cost=697273; R4 echo_snr_dB=23.2 doppler_Hz=91.7 false_alarm_cost=10919 miss_cost=148458; limit_echo_snr_dB=23.5; limit_doppler_Hz=111.9; limit_false_alarm_cost=124047; decision_budget_usd=47500; sensitivity_shift_pct=5; hard_threshold_record_count=1; removed_context="case study linked operational metrics to economic or safety decisions". Rules and constraints: Treat confidence below 0.70, missing provenance, or contradictory record status as needs_review even when the numeric score passes. Options or recommendations cannot use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; all calculations must use only the embedded packet, and any contradictory or under-supported record must be marked needs_review. Required work: choose threshold under asymmetric costs; convert the packet into an auditable evidence table, cite the governing values, and list unresolved assumptions. Deliver sonar_threshold_review.csv + threshold_memo.md with formulas or executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
